text: I feel both curiosity and a sense of slight alienation here. The environment is modern and purposefully designed for dialogue, inquiry, and display—both meeting and exhibition spaces. The transparency of glass walls hints at openness, yet the arrangement is clinical and almost impersonal. The exhibition wall about R+D (research and development) excites my intellectual appetite, but also makes me ponder the relentless forward march of innovation. I wonder—amidst all this progress, are we pausing to reflect on the nature of our desires and the direction we are steering ourselves? I feel like I am both an observer and a subject of this evolving world.
